meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Manus Shopify Connector
products.tagline: Build and manage Shopify stores from one chat
products.summaryZh: 通过一个聊天窗口构建并管理 Shopify 商店
products.descriptionZh: Manus 通过单一聊天界面搭建 Shopify 店铺、管理产品目录并生成营销活动。只需告知销售内容，即可处理文案、图片、商品系列及简报。适用于付费 Manus 套餐的 Shopify 商家及新店铺创始人。
products.description: Manus builds Shopify storefronts, manages product catalogs, and generates campaigns from a single chat. Tell it what you sell and it handles copy, images, collections, and briefs. For Shopify merchants and new store founders on paid Manus plans.

products.name: MAI-Image-2.5
products.tagline: Generate and edit images with precise scene control
products.summaryZh: 通过精确的场景控制生成和编辑图像
products.descriptionZh: MAI-Image-2.5是一款文本到图像及图像编辑模型，支持局部编辑、身份保留和文本渲染。该模型通过Foundry和OpenRouter平台提供，适用于开发者构建生产级图像工作流。
products.description: MAI-Image-2.5 is a text-to-image and image editing model that handles localized edits, identity preservation, and text rendering. Available via Foundry and OpenRouter for developers building production image workflows.

products.name: Gaming services by IFTTT
products.tagline: Level up the way you play with Steam, Dota 2, and more
products.summaryZh: 升级你的游戏体验，畅享Steam、Dota 2等更多内容。
products.descriptionZh: 全新游戏服务堆栈现已登陆IFTTT。连接Destiny 2、Diablo III、Hearthstone、World of Warcraft、StarCraft II、Dota 2、Team Fortress 2、Steam和Stoat，自动处理游戏中消耗时间的环节。无论是追踪Steam成就、掌握Hearthstone更新动态，还是确保不错过Xur，连接后一切自动运行。就连Diablo III硬核英雄的陨落也会被记录。可将其连接至Discord、Slack、Google Sheets等平台。
products.description: A whole new stack of gaming services just hit IFTTT. Connect Destiny 2, Diablo III, Hearthstone, World of Warcraft, StarCraft II, Dota 2, Team Fortress 2, Steam, and Stoat to automate the parts of gaming that eat up your time. Whether you're tracking Steam achievements, staying on top of Hearthstone releases, or making sure you never miss Xur, it all runs once connected. Even your Diablo III hardcore hero's death won't go undocumented. Hook it all up to Discord, Slack, Google Sheets, and more.

products.name: Navi+ Menu Builder
products.tagline: Add Tab Bar, Mega Menu & more to any website — no code
products.summaryZh: 为任意网站添加标签栏、超级菜单等更多功能——无需编码
products.descriptionZh:
大多数网站因导航混乱而流失访客——尤其在移动端。Navi+可在数分钟内解决此问题，且兼容任何平台。  
适用场景：  
→ Shopify — 从应用商店安装  
→ WordPress、Wix等 — 嵌入单行代码  
→ 任何支持HTML标签的网站  

功能特性：  
→ 标签栏、超级菜单、侧滑菜单、悬浮按钮、网格菜单  
→ 移动端原生应用般的使用体验  
→ AI菜单设计 — 数秒完成  
→ 零代码、零冲突  
→ 入门方案：永久免费  

Shopify应用商店评分4.9★，服务5000+商户。
products.description: Most websites lose visitors because navigation is confusing — especially on mobile. Navi+ fixes that in minutes, on any platform. Works everywhere: → Shopify — install from the App Store → WordPress, Wix.. — one embed snippet → Any website with an HTML tag What you get: → Tab Bar, Mega Menu, Slide Menu, FAB, Grid Menu → Feels like a native app on mobile → AI menu design — done in seconds → Zero code, zero conflicts → Starter plan: Free forever 4.9★ on Shopify App Store. 5,000+ merchants.

products.name: Fox Issue Tracker 4
products.tagline: Track, plan, and release.
products.summaryZh: 追踪、规划与发布。
products.descriptionZh: Fox 帮助你整理那些已超出待办应用和笔记管理范围的工作。专为独立开发者和小型团队设计，它围绕你正在发布的版本以及达成目标的关键里程碑来组织一切——将零散的任务转化为清晰的交付路径，并确保没有任何遗漏。
products.description: Fox helps you organize work that's outgrown todo apps and notes. Built for solo developers and small teams, it organizes everything around the versions you're shipping and the milestones that get you there—turning scattered tasks into a clear path to delivery and helping to ensure nothing is left behind.

products.name: freddy.
products.tagline: Plug your wearables into Claude, OpenClaw, and any AI
products.summaryZh: 将你的可穿戴设备接入Claude、OpenClaw及任意AI。
products.descriptionZh: 将您的可穿戴设备和健康数据源连接到您的ChatGPT、Claude、Claude Code或任何支持MCP的AI。睡眠、恢复、心率变异性、锻炼，均可通过自然语言查询。
products.description: Connect your wearable and health data sources to YOUR ChatGPT, Claude, Claude Code, or any AI that speaks MCP. Sleep, recovery, HRV, workouts, queryable in natural language.

products.name: Landing Page Roast
products.tagline: Get actionable feedback, design critiques & conversion ideas
products.summaryZh: 获取可执行的反馈、设计评审与转化建议
products.descriptionZh: 粘贴网站链接，即可获得着陆页分析报告，包含转化优化建议、用户体验洞察、文案评估及重新设计方案。
products.description: Paste a website URL to get a landing page roast with conversion-focused feedback, UX insights, copy critiques, and redesign concepts.

products.name: WOPA
products.tagline: Invoicing for tradespeople, right inside WhatsApp.
products.summaryZh: 面向手工艺人的开票功能，直接集成在WhatsApp中。
products.descriptionZh: WOPA 是一款面向英国手工艺人的 WhatsApp 发票助手。只需发送类似“给 Chris 开一张 850 英镑的重新布线发票”的消息，WOPA 便会生成 PDF 发票，供你审核，并通过邮件发送给客户，同时跟踪未结款项，协助催收逾期发票。客户收到的是普通邮件，而你则留在 WhatsApp 中操作。WOPA 会记住你所有的客户信息，随时供你调用。
products.description: WOPA is a WhatsApp invoicing assistant for UK tradespeople. Message it like “Invoice Chris £850 for rewire” and WOPA drafts a PDF invoice, lets you review it, emails it to your customer, tracks what’s outstanding, and helps chase unpaid invoices. Customers get a normal email; you stay in WhatsApp. WOPA remembers all your customers when you need it.

products.name: Crossposter
products.tagline: Free, open-source social publishing from localhost
products.summaryZh: 免费、开源的本地社交发布
products.descriptionZh: Crossposter 是一款免费、开源、本地优先的仪表盘，支持在本地主机上一次性撰写内容并发布到您自己的多个社交账号。可附加媒体、检查平台限制、立即发布或本地定时发布，同时将配置、上传文件、草稿、历史记录和凭证保留在您自己的设备上。
products.description: Crossposter is a free, open-source, local-first dashboard for composing once and publishing across your own social accounts from localhost. Attach media, check platform limits, publish now, or schedule posts locally while keeping config, uploads, drafts, history, and credentials on your own machine.

products.name: HermesMarkdown
products.tagline: Your Mind, Your Markdown, Your Machine.
products.summaryZh: 你的思维，你的Markdown，你的机器。
products.descriptionZh: 一款极简、注重隐私的Markdown编辑器，专为深度工作设计。无云端、无追踪、无干扰。你的数据始终保留在本地设备上。
products.description: A minimalist, privacy-focused Markdown editor for deep work. No cloud, no tracking, and no distractions. Your data stays on your device.

products.name: Ejentum - Reasoning Harness
products.tagline: Stop your AI agent drifting, flattering, and fabricating.
products.summaryZh: 阻止你的AI智能体偏离主题、阿谀奉承和捏造事实。
products.descriptionZh: Ejentum 塑造了AI代理在回答前的推理方式。一次API调用即可返回经过设计的认知操作：需规避的失败、执行流程、需抑制的捷径、必须通过的自检。通过托管MCP及13项集成，在四个框架（推理、代码、反欺骗、记忆）中覆盖679项操作。本次发布的新功能：自适应模式可根据具体任务定制操作，重写每一步推理以适应当前问题，而非动态匹配的认知操作。
products.description: Ejentum shapes how your AI agent reasons before it answers. One API call returns an engineered cognitive operation: the failure to avoid, a procedure, the shortcuts to suppress, a self-check it must pass. 679 across four harnesses (reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory), via a hosted MCP and 13 integrations. New in this launch: adaptive mode tailors the operation to your exact task, rewriting every reasoning step to fit the problem in front of you instead of a dynamic matched cognitive op.

products.name: Almanac Seed
products.tagline: Ship the spec, not the code. An AI builds the app.
products.summaryZh: 交付规格，而非代码。AI构建应用。
products.descriptionZh: Almanac Seed 不交付代码——只交付一份规格说明。一个 Markdown 文件描述了一款 Figma 风格的设计评审应用：在实时 HTML 设计上标注评论、支持讨论线程、显示在线状态，并设有供 AI 评审者使用的 API 通道。将 SEED.md 粘贴到你的编程代理中，它就能从零构建整个应用，验证每个功能是否正常运作，并在你的账户上部署属于你自己的实例。这不是模板——而是意图。开源，基于开放的 SEED 格式。当代码变得廉价时，规格说明才是资产。
products.description: Almanac Seed ships no code — just a spec. One markdown file describes a Figma-style design-review app: pin comments on live HTML designs, threads, presence, an API lane for AI reviewers. Paste SEED.md into your coding agent and it builds the whole app from scratch, verifies every feature works, and deploys YOUR own instance on your accounts. Not a template — intent. Open source, on the open SEED format. When code is cheap, the spec is the asset.

products.name: Pinguva
products.tagline: The cleanest, zero-config uptime & infrastructure monitor
products.summaryZh: 最简洁、零配置的运行时间与基础设施监控
products.descriptionZh: Pinguva 是一款美观、零配置的SaaS监控工具，可维护您的基础设施健康。无缝追踪网站运行时间、监控TLS/SSL证书到期时间，并检查DNS记录。无需复杂设置或杂乱仪表板，只需清晰、智能的告警。
products.description: Pinguva is a beautiful, zero-config SaaS monitor that keeps your infrastructure healthy. Track website Uptime, monitor TLS/SSL expiration, and check DNS records seamlessly. No complex setups or cluttered dashboards—just clear, smart alerts

products.name: Webstorio
products.tagline: AI Web Builder Platform with Everything Built-in
products.summaryZh: 内置全功能AI网页构建平台
products.descriptionZh: Webstorio 是一个内置所有功能的AI网站构建平台。与其他生成完整代码库的AI网站构建器不同，Webstorio 帮助您长期管理和发展网站。通过提示生成网站，进行可视化自定义，使用内置CMS管理内容，并集成身份验证、支付、SEO、分析、托管等功能。所有功能集成于一个平台。更快构建，自信维护。
products.description: Webstorio is an AI Web Builder Platform with Everything Built-in. Unlike other AI website builders that generate a full codebase, Webstorio helps you manage and grow your website long term. Generate a website from a prompt, customize it visually, manage content with a built-in CMS, and use integrated authentication, payments, SEO, analytics, hosting, and more. All in one platform. Build faster. Maintain with confidence.

products.name: Bleenk
products.tagline: Idea in. Live, production-ready app out.
products.summaryZh: 输入创意，输出可直接上线的应用。
products.descriptionZh: 大多数“AI应用构建工具”止步于一个无法上线的漂亮原型。Bleenk则全程护航，从提示词到部署完成、可投入生产的应用：包含真实后端、数据库、身份验证和实时托管。无需配置、无需开发团队、无需在工具间复制粘贴。底层由协调的智能体在Google Cloud、Neon、E2B和DigitalOcean的基础设施上规划、构建、测试和部署，因此你获得的是运行中的产品，而非演示。
products.description: Most "AI app builders" stop at a pretty prototype you can't ship. Bleenk takes you the whole way, from prompt to a deployed, production-ready app: real backend, database, auth, and live hosting included. No setup, no dev team, no copy-pasting between tools. Under the hood, coordinated agents plan, build, test, and deploy on infrastructure from Google Cloud, Neon, E2B, and DigitalOcean, so what you get is a running product, not a demo.

products.name: OmegaGPT
products.tagline: Fast, Free AI Chat - 100% Offline
products.summaryZh: 快速、免费的AI聊天——完全离线
products.descriptionZh: OmegaGPT 是一款快速、私密的AI聊天工具，完全离线运行。无需云端、无需网络、无需担心数据问题。随时随地提问，即使没有信号也能使用。运行于您的设备上，免费使用，安全可靠。支持iOS和Android平台。
products.description: OmegaGPT is a fast, private AI chat that works 100% offline. No cloud, no internet, no data worries. Ask anything, anytime - even without signal. Works on your device, free to use, secure. Available for iOS and Android.

products.name: Google Search Profiles
products.tagline: Profile for publishers/creators to highlight work on Search
products.summaryZh: 面向发布者/创作者的资料页面，用于在搜索中突出展示作品
products.descriptionZh: Google Search Profiles 允许发布者和创作者在搜索中认领专属页面，关联其社交和视频平台，并让用户直接在 Discover 中关注他们。目前仅限美国地区，申请资格需已有一定粉丝基础。
products.description: Google Search Profiles let publishers and creators claim a dedicated page on Search, link their social and video platforms, and get followed directly into Discover. Currently US-only, eligibility requires an existing following.

products.name: QWERTYS
products.tagline: My keyboard fell apart. Now it's your problem.
products.summaryZh: 我的键盘散架了。现在这是你的问题了。
products.descriptionZh: 键盘散落一地，重新堆叠起来。当俄罗斯方块遇上QWERTY。这是俄罗斯方块，只不过方块变成了按键，每个按键都有唯一的位置。把A放到A的位置上，Z放到Z的位置上，你懂的。放错位置，那个按键就会变成一块灰色的废砖，一直待在那里烦你，直到你把它炸掉。堆叠正确，键盘就会逐行亮起蓝光，直到整块键盘恢复完整。堆错太久，废砖堆到顶部，游戏结束。
products.description: The keyboard fell apart, stack it back together. Tetris meets QWERTY.t's Tetris, except the blocks are keys and every single one has exactly one home. Drop the A on the A. The Z on the Z. You get it. Miss the spot, and that key turns into a useless gray brick that just sits there, bothering you until you explode it. Stack them right and the keyboard lights up blue, row by row, until the whole thing is whole again. Stack them wrong long enough and the junk piles to the top and it's over.

products.name: Manifesto Page
products.tagline: Track political promises. Measure progress.
products.summaryZh: 追踪政治承诺，衡量进展。
products.descriptionZh: 实时追踪印度人民党在西孟加拉邦的承诺，获取最新动态。监测治理、就业、基础设施等类别的承诺履行情况。公民力量推动西孟加拉邦选举问责。
products.description: Track BJP West Bengal promises with real-time updates. Monitor promise fulfillment across categories like governance, employment, and infrastructure. Citizen-powered accountability for West Bengal elections.

products.name: Paige
products.tagline: A private, encrypted newborn tracker with no accounts
products.summaryZh: 无账户的私密加密新生儿追踪器
products.descriptionZh: Paige 帮你记录喂养、换尿布以及你睡着时发生的一切，无需你全部记在脑中。无需账户，端到端加密，设计精美，易于使用。
products.description: Paige keeps track of the feeds, the nappies and what happened while you were asleep, so you don't have to hold it all in your head. No accounts, end-to-end encrypted, beautifully designed and easy to use.
